properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What could you be thinking, Lord, to allow this tragedy? You must have some confidence instilled in me Only you can see what lies deep within this troubled mind An overwhelming pain I look for You to bind

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Because You’ll heal my broken heart Calm my spirit, stand my guard Soothe my troubled fears Remind me You’re here And heal my broken heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There are days I make it through O, but Lord, don’t ask me how If there’s a lesson for me to learn, then show me now I believe no tears that fall could be wasted in your plan But, Lord, I need some help here, Help me understand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In time You’ll heal my broken heart Calm my spirit, stand my guard Soothe my troubled fears Remind me You’re here And heal my broken heart

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You know how I’m fighting these feelings inside My hope isn’t dying. It will be revived (it will be revived)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Because You’ll heal my broken heart Calm my spirit, stand my guard Soothe my troubled fears Remind me You’re here And heal my heart, my broken heart Yes, You will heal my heart
